generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor modeled within BIM environment with runtime semantics for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor modeled within BIM environment with runtime semantics for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance PressureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Pressure sensor modeled within BIM environment with runtime semantics for operational monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OperationalDataTransmitted
]

instance FlowRateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Flow rate sensor modeled within BIM environment with runtime semantics for operational monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OperationalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor
]

instance OperationalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PressureSensor, FlowRateSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor data synchronized between physical and digital twins"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance OperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational sensor data synchronized between physical and digital twins"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OperationalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric BIM model enriched with semantic definitions of BCS components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware for real-time sensor data exchange and device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware for device connectivity and synchronization with digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) tool for transforming BIM models into deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeployableArtifactsService
]

instance ModularExtensionPoints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems for operational oversight"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure performance and failure forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance OperationalOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational processes for energy efficiency and cost savings"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalOptimizationInsight, ControlCommand
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision-making support for AECO stakeholders across building lifecycle phases"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance CustomAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Custom analytical services integrated via modular extension points for evolving operational requirements"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomInsight
]

instance DeployableArtifactsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for deploying MDE-generated DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeployableArtifactsInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights for facility managers to monitor building systems"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics insights for infrastructure performance and maintenance planning"
]

instance OperationalOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insights for operational processes and resource allocation"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights for strategic decisions across building lifecycle"
]

instance CustomInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights generated from custom analytics for dynamic operational adjustments"
]

instance DeployableArtifactsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights derived from deployable DT artifacts for system optimization"
]

instance ControlCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to adjust physical actuators based on digital twin analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValveActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Valve actuator modeled within BIM with control logic for operational management"
]

instance DamperActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Damper actuator modeled within BIM with control logic for operational management"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building represented as a cyber-physical asset"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, PressureSensor, FlowRateSensor, ValveActuator, DamperActuator, DTFramework
]

instance DTFramework : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework acting as hub for multiple DT instances"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for building infrastructure operations are transmitted from the digital twin to Building Control Systems (BCS) through runtime interfaces, with bidirectional communication ensuring command validation, execution confirmation, and feedback. Facility Managers directly operate physical infrastructure via the DT interface."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points integrates custom services and analytics; the DT Framework serves as a central hub for bidirectional data exchange, coordinating roles such as Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers for holistic building lifecycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, where sensors, actuators, and controllers are defined to address BIM's static limitations. Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles are then applied to extract structured representations and automatically generate deployable DT artifacts. Continuous real-time data exchange synchronizes the physical and digital twins, while interactive visualization enables monitoring and control. The modular architecture with standardized extension points supports integration of custom services and analytics, facilitating evolution to meet changing operational needs."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure the accuracy of the digital twin's reflection of physical states, with verification processes ensuring alignment between modeled and real-world behaviors."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connectivity employs a layered system architecture with Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware for IoT data ingestion and digital twin management, enabling protocol translation and data routing between BIM models and physical assets across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The framework integrates Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework addresses the absence of standardized integration frameworks by leveraging AECO-specific BIM standards for modeling and Eclipse Ditto for IoT communication standards (e.g., MQTT). It implements standardized extension points to ensure interoperability and modular service integration, while a modeling methodology standardizes BIM semantics to bridge static representations with dynamic DT requirements."
]
